title: 6Pc Stainless Steel BBQ Skewers - Barbecue Kebab Sticks, Food Grill Cooking Tandoori | Grilling Bbqs Forks | Superior Skewer Set Durable and Reusable Hand Tool
features: HEALTHY CHOICE - Grill masters, up your game with a meat and veggie arsenal! your doctor says eat more veggies! but you hate vegetables. well i am here to tell you grilling a good piece of seasoned meat with onions, peppers and squash is actually not that bad. it’s pretty tasty!
DURABLE - Skewers made of high quality stainless steel with a smooth finished, so that food slides smoothly on and off. Easy to clean and reusable.

PERFECT SIZE - They're not too wide but just wide enough to hold your food on.These flat blade skewers work much better than the typical round skewers as they tend to hold the food on better and not let them spin around or slide off.

FOR GRILLING - Stainless steel flat kebab skewers are more than enough to get most grilling jobs done, you can put much more food you like. Great for camping, indoor grilling, outdoor BBQ or any other places you love.
EASY GRIP HANDLES - The kebab skewers with handles keep your fingers from being burned and make them super easy to place, turn, and remove from the grill without needing tongs
